title: Refactor sync engine to use async context managers
description: The sync engine's connector lifecycle is not properly managed. Switch to async context managers for cleaner resource handling.
raw_text: Refactor sync engine to use async context managers for connector lifecycle.

title: Add request timeout configuration
description: Make HTTP request timeouts configurable per connector instead of hardcoded 30s.
raw_text: Make HTTP request timeouts configurable per connector.

title: Investigate P0 ranking algorithm bug
description: P0 tasks sometimes get ranked below P2 tasks in the daily plan. Review the scoring formula and weighting.
raw_text: Investigate P0 ranking algorithm bug where P0 tasks get ranked below P2 tasks.

title: Fix Safari WebGL context loss with Canvas2D fallback
description: Add Canvas2D renderer fallback when WebGL context is lost in Safari browsers.
raw_text: Add Canvas2D renderer fallback when WebGL context is lost in Safari.

title: DB migration v2 schema review
description: QA review of the v2 database migration script affecting users, tasks, and analytics tables.
raw_text: QA review of the v2 database migration script.
